div.h1: Your AI Assistant for Government Schemes
div.p: Find the right welfare programs, jobs, and training for your family. Ask in Hindi or English.

div.class: flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-6 mb-8
bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-sm px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-3
w-10 h-10 bg-[#a03b00]/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center
bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-sm px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-3
w-10 h-10 bg-green-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center

w-12 h-12 bg-white/20 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg

div.p: Ask in Hindi or English — voice supported

div.class: flex items-center gap-3
flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-5 chat-container glass-card
flex items-start gap-4 animate-fade
w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#a03b00] to-[#c94c00] rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 shadow-lg floating-shadow
glass-card rounded-3xl rounded-tl-md p-5 max-w-[85%]
div.p:
नमस्ते! 🙏
मैं आपकी सरकारी योजनाओं में मदद के लिए यहाँ हूँ।
अपना सवाल हिंदी या अंग्रेजी में लिखें या बोलें।

span.class: text-xs text-[#a3a3a3] mt-3 block border-t border-gray-100 pt-2

div.span: उदाहरण: "mujhe kisan ke liye yojana batao"

div.class: px-6 py-5 glass-card border-t border-white/30
flex items-center gap-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-white/60 to-white/40 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 border border-white/50 input-focus hover-lift

div.p: बोलो भाई, तुम्हारी सुन रहा हूँ
